comment: 4-screen flow. Seeded: CTA renamed 'Create account'->'Register now' between screens 1 and 2; 4 equal-weight plans with no default/recommendation; final screen lacks signup confirmation; empty dashboard with no guidance.

must_find.note: CTA label inconsistency across the flow
no confirmation that the account was created
plan choice has no default or recommendation
dashboard is an empty box with no first-run guidance
